items.title: 2026/578: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG
items.description: Demolition of deconsecrated church building. Redevelopment of former methodist church site to provide a four-storey block of sixteen flats, comprising six one-bedroom flats, eight two-bedroom flats and two three-bedroom flats
items.headline: Plans Submitted for 16 Flats on Former Hurst Green Church Site
items.summary: A planning application proposes demolishing the deconsecrated Methodist Church on Hurstlands and replacing it with a four-storey block of 16 flats. The scheme would include six one-bedroom, eight two-bedroom and two three-bedroom homes.

data.address: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG

items.title: 2026/492: 87 Silkham Road, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0NS
items.description: Variation of Condition 2 (Approved drawings) of planning permission ref: 2025/1537 dated 18/03/2026 (Demolition of existing conservatory. Erection of single storey extension to rear elevation. Garage conversion including raising existing garage roof to match height of new single storey rear extension) to allow revisions to the footprint that account for a previously unknown sewer pipe.
items.headline: Sewer pipe forces redesign of Silkham Road extension
items.summary: Plans for a single-storey rear extension and garage conversion at 87 Silkham Road have returned to the council after a previously unknown sewer pipe was found. The owners want to change the building's footprint to work around the pipe, amending permission first granted in March 2026.

data.address: 87 Silkham Road, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0NS
